title: Positional Encodings (RoPE/ALiBi)
description: Evaluate how positional encodings, such as RoPE and ALiBi, represent token order. Understand the architectural limitations of extending context length beyond training boundaries using different positional encoding schemes.
objectives: Evaluate how positional encodings, such as RoPE and ALiBi, represent token order.
Understand the architectural limitations of extending context length beyond training boundaries using different positional encoding schemes.
